message:
Implement WAMR dispatch functions for file, spawn, and HTTP

Replaced stub dispatch functions with full implementations:

File dispatch (fileDispatch):
- fileReadStart: Synchronous file read with proper WASM memory access
- fileWriteStart: File write with directory creation support
- filePoll, fileResultLen, fileResult, fileFree for async API

Spawn dispatch (spawnDispatch):
- spawnStart: Process spawning using std.process.Child
- JSON argument parsing for command args
- Captures stdout/stderr output
- spawnPoll, spawnOutputLen, spawnOutput, spawnFree

HTTP dispatch (httpDispatch):
- Uses Zig std.http.Client for actual network requests
- Supports GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH methods
- Custom header support via "Key: Value\r\n" format
- httpRequest, httpGetResponseLen, httpGetResponse

Also updated wasm_fetch.zig to use host HTTP dispatch instead of
WASI sockets, enabling WAMR to make HTTP requests without socket
support.

Tested and verified all three dispatch functions work:
- File read: Successfully reads /tmp files
- Spawn: Successfully runs shell commands (echo hello)
- HTTP: Successfully fetches from https://api.ipify.org (200 OK)
